goal: Characterize the distribution of cell subsets across tumor tissue, adjacent normal tissue, and peripheral blood in anti-PD-1-treated colorectal cancer. Identify which cell types are specifically and highly enriched only in the tumor microenvironment, and explain why.

metadata.gold_finding: SPP1+ TAMs, FAP+ CAFs, COL4A1+ endothelial, LAYN+ exhausted CD8 T cells are tumor-specific

goal: Which baseline tumor cell subtypes predict immunotherapy response (tumor regression) in anti-PD-1 colorectal cancer, and do they correlate positively or negatively?

metadata.gold_finding: TNFRSF9+ Treg positively; MUC2+ goblet, FAP+ fibroblast, APOE+ macrophage negatively correlate with regression

goal: Which plasma proteins correlate with changes in body composition (fat percentage and breast volume) following feminizing gender-affirming hormone therapy?

metadata.gold_finding: adipokines especially leptin (LEP) track body-composition change; also CA6, MUC1, INSL3, CXCL13
